name: xauusd_asia_london_breakout_m5
hypothesis: After a contained Asia-session range on XAUUSD, the London session produces a volatility expansion; trading the first ATR-confirmed breakout of the Asia range during 07:00-10:00 UTC yields positive expectancy because liquidity rotation creates directional follow-through.

entry_rules.long: During 07:00-10:00 UTC, candle closes above Asia-range high by >= 0.5*ATR(14) with body >= 1.2*ATR(14); only first breakout of the day; regime_filter must pass.
entry_rules.short: Mirror: close below Asia-range low by >= 0.5*ATR(14) with body >= 1.2*ATR(14); only first breakout of the day.

exit_rules.stop_loss: 0.75 * ATR(14) from entry, capped to opposite side of Asia range
exit_rules.time_stop: close if not hit SL/TP within 36 M5 bars (3h) or at 12:00 UTC, whichever first

falsifiable_conditions: Reject if PF < 2.0, Sharpe < 1.5, trades < 200 over 3y, or if win rate on first-breakout subset is statistically indistinguishable from a random same-session entry.
notes: Inspired by LVC scout card; distinct from Pine priors (which target indices).
